rules: Use AGENTS.md as the primary repository instruction file.
Read docs/PRD.md, docs/ARCHITECTURE.md, docs/ADR.md, and docs/UI_GUIDE.md before designing phase steps.
Do not copy full local Markdown documents into phase files, step output JSON, commits, or new docs.
Do not commit, push, or create branches unless explicitly requested or the matching CLI option is used.
Keep generated artifacts and private gym photos out of git by default.
